posts.raw_content:
A religion seeks truth, encourages debate, and allows free will. 
A cult demands blind obedience, punishes dissent, and seeks to dominate all aspects of life. Islam fits the cult definition perfectly:
- Absolute authority (Muhammad is the "perfect man," his words are infallible).
- Us vs. Them mentality (Dar al-Islam vs. Dar al-Harb—House of War).
- Punishment for leaving (Apostasy = death).
- Control over daily life (Prayer 5x a day, dietary laws, dress codes, etc.).

No other major religion executes people for leaving. But Islam does. That’s not a religion—that’s a cult with a billion members.
The West is funding its own destruction
Worst of all? We’re letting them in. Western leaders bend over backward to accommodate Islam, while ignoring the genocide of Christians in the Middle East. We’re told to "respect" a belief system that hates our guts and wants to replace our laws with Sharia.
Why are we importing people who believe in stoning women?
Why are we funding mosques that preach jihad?
Why are we allowing Sharia courts to operate in our countries?Islam is a Threat—and we should act like It.
Islam isn’t just another religion. It’s a "civilizational jihad"—a slow-motion invasion designed to replace Western culture with Islamic rule. And if we don’t wake up, we’ll be living under Sharia before we know it.

So ask yourself:
- Do you want your daughters wearing burqas?
- Do you want your sons executed for "blasphemy"?
- Do you want your country ruled by medieval theocrats?

If not, it’s time to stop pretending Islam is just "another faith." 
It’s a cult of conquest, and it’s coming for us all.
posts.author: NSFW_PORN_ONLY

  • Absolute authority (Muhammad is the "perfect man," his words are infallible).
  • Us vs. Them mentality (Dar al-Islam vs. Dar al-Harb—House of War).
  • Punishment for leaving (Apostasy = death).
  • Control over daily life (Prayer 5x a day, dietary laws, dress codes, etc.).

No other major religion executes people for leaving. But Islam does. That’s not a religion—that’s a cult with a billion members. The West is funding its own destruction Worst of all? We’re letting them in. Western leaders bend over backward to accommodate Islam, while ignoring the genocide of Christians in the Middle East. We’re told to "respect" a belief system that hates our guts and wants to replace our laws with Sharia. Why are we importing people who believe in stoning women? Why are we funding mosques that preach jihad? Why are we allowing Sharia courts to operate in our countries?Islam is a Threat—and we should act like It. Islam isn’t just another religion. It’s a "civilizational jihad"—a slow-motion invasion designed to replace Western culture with Islamic rule. And if we don’t wake up, we’ll be living under Sharia before we know it.

So ask yourself:

  • Do you want your daughters wearing burqas?
  • Do you want your sons executed for "blasphemy"?
  • Do you want your country ruled by medieval theocrats?

If not, it’s time to stop pretending Islam is just "another faith." It’s a cult of conquest, and it’s coming for us all.
